nodes.name: Fulvous-headed brushfinch
nodes.summary: The fulvous-headed brushfinch (Atlapetes fulviceps) is a species of bird in the family Passerellidae. It is found in Bolivia and northwestern Argentina. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist montane forest and heavily degraded former forest. References

nodes.name: Fulvous-headed brushfinch
nodes.summary: Fulvous-headed brushfinch（Atlapetes fulviceps）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Fulvous-headed brushfinch。

nodes.name: Atlapetes
nodes.summary: Atlapetes（Atlapetes）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联32种鸟类，如Rufous-capped brushfinch、White-naped brushfinch、Yellow-thighed brushfinch等32种鸟类。
